problem id: bcdf9198
category: bit_manipulation

rule: I XOR NOT

examples:
  10001011 -> 11111111
  00011111 -> 11111111
  01011100 -> 11111111
  10101000 -> 11111111
  11110010 -> 11111111
  10111000 -> 11111111
  01111100 -> 11111111
  11011010 -> 11111111
  10101111 -> 11111111

query: 01100010
predicted answer: 11111111
